name: Quick Carrot Nut Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw carrots; scrubbed and slivered
2/3 cup Chunky peanut butter or cashew butter
3/4 cup Ripe banana, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender, adding about a quarter of the ingredients at a time.
2. Blend until smooth, turning off the blender occasionally to scrape down the sides.
